# Meters

## Meter Types

| # | Code | Description |
|---|------|-------------|
| 1 | C | Meter Test Start |
| 2 | H | Hard Drop |
| 3 | Q | Meter Test End |
| 4 | S | Soft Drop (outside the window in MA10.1) |
| 5 | M | Hourly |
| 6 | F | Final |
| 7 | L | Location Change |
| 8 | B | Blown |
| 9 | R | Reset Blown |
| 10 | A | Audit |
| 11 | I | Initial |
| 12 | X | On Demand |
| 13 | J | Soft Drop Outside Window |
| 14 | K | Hard Drop Outside Window |
| 15 | D | End of Day (S2S & IGS) |
| 16 | E | Exception Soft Drop |
| 17 | P | Hopper Paid Progressives |
| 18 | G | Exception Hard Drop |
| 19 | Y | Theme Activation |
| 20 | Z | Theme Deactivation |

## Inserting Meters (Proc_TranslatorMeterInsertEx)

Meters are generated by executing `Proc_TranslatorMeterInsertEx` with the parameters below.

### Full Parameter List

```sql
EXEC Proc_TranslatorMeterInsertEx
    @TYPE,                          -- char(1): meter type code (see Meter Types table)
    @DATE,                          -- datetime: e.g. '2025-04-05 13:00:10.000'
    @UniqueID,                      -- int: must be unique per day; query MAX and increment
    @Mnum,                          -- int: machine number
    @MtrPhysicalCoinIn,             -- bigint (5)
    @MtrPhysicalCoinOut,            -- bigint (6)
    @MtrCoinin,                     -- bigint (7)
    @MtrCoinout,                    -- bigint (8)
    @MtrGames,                      -- bigint (9)
    @MtrTotalDrop,                  -- bigint (10) ★ CALCULATED — see rules below
    @MtrSoft1,                      -- bigint (11)
    @MtrSoft2,                      -- bigint (12)
    @MtrSoft3,                      -- bigint (13)
    @MtrSoft4,                      -- bigint (14)
    @MtrSoft5,                      -- bigint (15)
    @MtrSoft6,                      -- bigint (16)
    @MtrSoft7,                      -- bigint (17)
    @MtrSoft8,                      -- bigint (18) — NOT included in TotalBills
    @MtrSoft9,                      -- bigint (19) — NOT included in TotalBills
    @MtrSoft10,                     -- bigint (20) — NOT included in TotalBills
    @MtrTotalBills,                 -- bigint (21) ★ CALCULATED = sum(Soft1..Soft7)
    @MtrAttendantWin,               -- bigint (22)
    @MtrAttendantCancelCredit,      -- bigint (23)
    @MtrAttendantProgWin,           -- bigint (24)
    @MtrNCEPromoIn,                 -- bigint (25)
    @MtrMachineBonusWin,            -- bigint (26)
    @MtrCashableBonus,              -- bigint (27) ★ ALWAYS SET TO -1
    @MtrMachineProgWin,             -- bigint (28)
    @MtrCEPromoOut,                 -- bigint (29)
    @MtrCoinDrop,                   -- bigint (30)
    @MtrAttendantBonusWin,          -- bigint (31)
    @MtrCouponIn,                   -- bigint (32)
    @MtrCouponOut,                  -- bigint (33)
    @Online,                        -- char(1) (34) — default 'N' for test meters
    @BE2Q,                          -- smallint (35) — default 0 for test meters
    @BSQ,                           -- smallint (36) — default 0 for test meters
    @InPlay,                        -- char(1) (37) — default 'N' for test meters
    @MtrHopperLevel,                -- bigint (38)
    @MtrWATIn,                      -- bigint (39)
    @MtrWATOut,                     -- bigint (40)
    @MtrVoucherIn,                  -- bigint (41)
    @MtrVoucherOut,                 -- bigint (42)
    @MtrVoucherInCount,             -- bigint (43)
    @MtrVoucherOutCount,            -- bigint (44)
    @MtrRPromoIn,                   -- bigint (45)
    @MtrEFTIn,                      -- bigint (46)
    @MtrCEPromoIn,                  -- bigint (47)
    @MtrNCEPromoOut,                -- bigint (48)
    @MtrCardedWager,                -- bigint (49)
    @MtrRPromoOut,                  -- bigint (50)
    @MtrMachineWin,                 -- bigint (51)
    @MtrNRBonus,                    -- bigint (52)
    @MtrBonus,                      -- bigint (53)
    @MtrPointPlay,                  -- bigint (54)
    @MtrLegacyNRBonus,              -- bigint (55)
    @MtrLegacyBonus,                -- bigint (56)
    @MtrLegacyPointPlay,            -- bigint (57)
    @MtrNRCouponIn,                 -- bigint (58) optional, default NULL
    @MtrWeightedAvgTheoPayback,     -- bigint (59) optional, default NULL
    @MtrWATInCount,                 -- bigint (60) optional, default NULL
    @MtrWATOutCount,                -- bigint (61) optional, default NULL
    @MtrCouponInCount,              -- bigint (62) optional, default NULL
    @MtrCouponOutCount,             -- bigint (63) optional, default NULL
    @MtrCEPromoPlayed,              -- bigint (64) optional, default NULL
    @MtrNRVoucherInCount,           -- bigint (65) optional, default NULL
    @CardedDropMachineList,         -- VARCHAR(MAX) (66) optional, default NULL
    @MtrMoneyIn,                    -- bigint (67) ★ CALCULATED — see rules below
    @MtrMoneyOut,                   -- bigint (68)
    @MtrNCEPromoPlayed,             -- bigint (69) optional, default NULL
    @MtrTaxOut                      -- bigint (70) optional, default NULL
```

### Important Rules

- Each meter must have a **unique UniqueID** — take the latest UniqueID for the day and increment it.
- The date/time must be from the **current day** (while audit is open).
- Audit must not be closed when inserting meters.
- `@MtrCashableBonus` must **always be set to -1** (historical translator convention).

### Calculated Fields

- **TotalBills** (param 21) = `Soft1 + Soft2 + Soft3 + Soft4 + Soft5 + Soft6 + Soft7` — Soft8, Soft9, Soft10 are **NOT** included.
- **TotalDrop** (param 10) = `TotalBills + EFTIn + VoucherIn + WATIn`.
- **MoneyIn** (param 67) = `TotalDrop` (same as TotalDrop — represents total money input).

### Non-Meter Parameter Defaults (for test meters)

| Parameter | Position | Default | Notes |
|-----------|----------|---------|-------|
| `@Online` | 34 | `'N'` | Machine online status |
| `@BE2Q` | 35 | `0` | Bill events to queue |
| `@BSQ` | 36 | `0` | Bill stacker quantity |
| `@InPlay` | 37 | `'N'` | In-play indicator |

### Complete Example

Insert an hourly meter for machine 10285 with VoucherIn=22, WATIn=11, all others=1:

```sql
-- 1. Get next UniqueID
SELECT MAX(UniqueID) FROM MeterRead WHERE CONVERT(DATE, MeterDate) = '2025-04-03'
-- Result: 2 → use 3

-- 2. Calculate fields:
--    TotalBills = Soft1..Soft7 = 7 × 1 = 7
--    TotalDrop  = TotalBills(7) + EFTIn(1) + VoucherIn(22) + WATIn(11) = 41
--    MoneyIn    = TotalDrop = 41

-- 3. Insert
EXEC Proc_TranslatorMeterInsertEx
    'M',                        -- @TYPE: Hourly
    '2025-04-03 13:00:10',      -- @DATE
    3,                          -- @UniqueID
    10285,                      -- @Mnum
    1,                          -- @MtrPhysicalCoinIn
    1,                          -- @MtrPhysicalCoinOut
    1,                          -- @MtrCoinin
    1,                          -- @MtrCoinout
    1,                          -- @MtrGames
    41,                         -- @MtrTotalDrop (calculated)
    1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1,       -- @MtrSoft1–7
    1, 1, 1,                    -- @MtrSoft8–10
    7,                          -- @MtrTotalBills (calculated: Soft1–7)
    1,                          -- @MtrAttendantWin
    1,                          -- @MtrAttendantCancelCredit
    1,                          -- @MtrAttendantProgWin
    1,                          -- @MtrNCEPromoIn
    1,                          -- @MtrMachineBonusWin
    -1,                         -- @MtrCashableBonus (ALWAYS -1)
    1,                          -- @MtrMachineProgWin
    1,                          -- @MtrCEPromoOut
    1,                          -- @MtrCoinDrop
    1,                          -- @MtrAttendantBonusWin
    1,                          -- @MtrCouponIn
    1,                          -- @MtrCouponOut
    'N',                        -- @Online
    0,                          -- @BE2Q
    0,                          -- @BSQ
    'N',                        -- @InPlay
    1,                          -- @MtrHopperLevel
    11,                         -- @MtrWATIn
    1,                          -- @MtrWATOut
    22,                         -- @MtrVoucherIn
    1,                          -- @MtrVoucherOut
    1,                          -- @MtrVoucherInCount
    1,                          -- @MtrVoucherOutCount
    1,                          -- @MtrRPromoIn
    1,                          -- @MtrEFTIn
    1,                          -- @MtrCEPromoIn
    1,                          -- @MtrNCEPromoOut
    1,                          -- @MtrCardedWager
    1,                          -- @MtrRPromoOut
    1,                          -- @MtrMachineWin
    1,                          -- @MtrNRBonus
    1,                          -- @MtrBonus
    1,                          -- @MtrPointPlay
    1,                          -- @MtrLegacyNRBonus
    1,                          -- @MtrLegacyBonus
    1,                          -- @MtrLegacyPointPlay
    NULL,                       -- @MtrNRCouponIn
    NULL,                       -- @MtrWeightedAvgTheoPayback
    1,                          -- @MtrWATInCount
    1,                          -- @MtrWATOutCount
    1,                          -- @MtrCouponInCount
    1,                          -- @MtrCouponOutCount
    NULL,                       -- @MtrCEPromoPlayed
    NULL,                       -- @MtrNRVoucherInCount
    NULL,                       -- @CardedDropMachineList
    41,                         -- @MtrMoneyIn (calculated = TotalDrop)
    1,                          -- @MtrMoneyOut
    NULL,                       -- @MtrNCEPromoPlayed
    NULL                        -- @MtrTaxOut
```

## Querying Meters

```sql
-- Find meter reads for a machine
SELECT mn.Name, mrd.MeterValue, mrd.MeterNameID, mr.*
FROM MeterRead mr
JOIN MeterReadDetail mrd ON mr.MID = mrd.MID
JOIN MeterNames mn ON mn.ID = mrd.MeterNameID
WHERE mr.MNum = <MachineNum>
  AND mrd.MeterValue > 0
  AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(25), mr.MeterDate, 126) LIKE '<date>%'

-- Meter names lookup
SELECT * FROM MeterNames WHERE Name LIKE '%<keyword>%'
```

## Updating Meter Values

```sql
-- Update meter date
UPDATE MeterRead SET MeterDate = '<datetime>' WHERE MID = <id>

-- Update meter value (e.g., MeterNameID 38 = EFT In, 31 = WAT In)
UPDATE MeterReadDetail SET MeterValue = <value> WHERE MID = <id> AND MeterNameID = <nameId>
```

Values of `MeterValue` are displayed in the "Current Meters for Machine" window. Use digit values; `0` and `NULL` display differently.

## Increment Parameter Fix

When a machine is created without manual meters, the increment parameter must be set:

```sql
EXEC Proc_TranslatorMeterIncrementUpdate <MachineNum>, <DenomValue>
-- DenomValue is the denom of machine (e.g., 1 = 1 cent for 0.01)
```

The `mtrIncrement` field is set to the denom value and `mtrMoney` is set to Money × denom.

## Meter On Demand

1. In MA: Pick → Audit → Meter On Demand.
2. Select → New → choose machine and start.
3. A record appears in `MeterOnDemandRequest`.
4. Take the date from that record and use it in `Proc_TranslatorMeterInsertEx` with type `'X'` — **dates must match exactly**.
5. The result lands in `MeterOnDemand` table and becomes visible in MA.
